channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: As more people turn to chatbots for health advice, studies say they may be led astray
item.description: People are turning to AI chatbots to help them with medical advice. Recent studies suggest these bots are not always helpful in making decisions about...

item.title: This Zodiac Sign Is Definitely The Most Likely To Flake On Plans

Got elbow or heel pain? Shockwave therapy can help
item.description: As more people stay active as they age, overuse injuries are increasing. A non-invasive treatment known as shockwave therapy can help ease heel and el...

item.title: A homeless shelter and rehab center holds a marathon to get people back on their feet
item.description: Outside of Chicago, a homeless shelter and rehab center called Wayside Cross hosts a unique program to help people get back on their feet, one mile at...

item.title: Ivermectin is making a post-pandemic comeback, among cancer patients
item.description: The anti-parasitic drug became a household name during the COVID-19 pandemic, and it is now being embraced as an alternative treatment for cancer. It ...

item.title: Some families afraid of ICE are forgoing medical care. These volunteers help them
item.description: In Minneapolis, underground healthcare networks of volunteer doctors and nurses bring care into the homes of families too scared of immigration enforc...

item.title: Best Protein Sources for a Healthy, Balanced Diet
item.description: Looking to add more protein to your meals? Explore high-protein foods, including affordable options, to help meet your daily needs.

item.title: 5 Ways To Address Crepey Skin On Your Neck, Backed By Science & A Derm
item.description: Here's a skin care fact for you: The skin on your neck and chest is some of the most delicate, sensitive, and thinnest of the entire body.

item.title: This Common Factor Could Be Making You Less Motivated To Work Out
item.description: When it comes to exercise, motivation is everything.
